title: Terminal & Command Line
description: Navigate files, run commands, install tools, and control your dev environment
longDescription: The terminal is your direct line to the machine -- no buttons, no menus, just raw power. Think of it like the cockpit of a plane: the graphical interface is the passenger cabin (comfortable, limited), but the terminal is where the pilot sits (full control over everything). Every vibecoder eventually needs it -- to install packages, run dev servers, deploy apps, and fix things when GUIs fail. This course takes you from 'what is this black screen?' to confidently navigating files, chaining commands, managing processes, and building workflows that make you faster than any point-and-click developer.
